heading: Omitted
label: 721 to 723 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 721 to 723, relating to Territory of Hawaii, were omitted in view of admission of Hawaii into the Union.Section 721, acts , title I, § 101, ; , title I, § 107(3), (7), (9), , 638, authorized Hawaiian government to undertake slum clearance and urban redevelopment and renewal projects.July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 637Section 721a, acts , title I, § 102, ; , title I, § 107(3), , authorized government of Hawaii to assist slum clearance and urban redevelopment projects through cash donations, loans conveyances of real and personal property, facilities and services.July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 344Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 78369 Stat. 637Section 721b, , , ratified all legislation enacted by Legislature of Territory of Hawaii dealing with subject matter of sections 721 to 722 of this title.act July 18, 1950, ch. 466, title I, § 10364 Stat. 345Section 722, acts , ; , title II, § 202(a), , gave Legislature of Territory of Hawaii power to create public corporate authorities to engage in slum clearance, or housing undertaking.July 10, 1937, ch. 48450 Stat. 508July 18, 1950, ch. 46664 Stat. 345Section 723, , as added , , and amended, related to insurance of mortgages on property in Hawaii. See , Banks and Banking.act June 27, 1934, ch. 847, § 214Apr. 23, 1949, ch. 89, § 2(a)63 Stat. 57section 1715d of Title 12
